Legend
Created from the belief that clothing should support a woman, not restrain her. The Sienna Ease Blouse was designed as a quiet alternative to structured dressing — softer, lighter, more intuitive.
Description
A fluid silhouette with refined embroidery and a modern three-quarter sleeve. Breathable fabric allows movement and ease, while subtle detailing adds character without excess.
Effortless elegance for everyday presence.
